label: qwen36-q4-speculative-placement-patch
patchBehavior: Explicit --spec-draft-device none forces draft LLAMA_SPLIT_MODE_NONE and main_gpu=-1.
Exactly one explicit draft device with target tensor split forces draft LLAMA_SPLIT_MODE_NONE on that single draft device.
Multiple draft devices preserve tensor split behavior.

speculativeAttempts.name: cpu_draft_none
speculativeAttempts.placementValidated: target Meta() on three B70s; draft CPU model, CPU KV, CPU compute
speculativeAttempts.failureSignal: alloc: can't allocate 889986048 Bytes of memory on device/GPU

speculativeAttempts.name: draft_sycl3_q8_cache_on
speculativeAttempts.placementValidated: target Meta() on three B70s; draft model/KV/compute on SYCL3
speculativeAttempts.failureSignal: alloc: can't allocate 889986048 Bytes of memory on device/GPU

speculativeAttempts.name: draft_sycl3_q8_cache_off
speculativeAttempts.placementValidated: target Meta() on three B70s; draft model/KV/compute on SYCL3
speculativeAttempts.failureSignal: alloc: can't allocate 889986048 Bytes of memory on device/GPU

speculativeAttempts.name: draft_sycl3_q8_cache_off_c512
speculativeAttempts.placementValidated: target Meta() on three B70s; draft model/KV/compute on SYCL3
speculativeAttempts.failureSignal: alloc: can't allocate 889986048 Bytes of memory on device/GPU

localMaxxing.reason: Placement patch is useful, but speculative runs failed or timed out and are not valid benchmarks.

conclusion: Draft placement can be made correct with a small patch, but Qwen3.5 4B remains a failed draft path for Qwen3.6 27B on llama.cpp/SYCL because common-init speculative runs hang with repeated SYCL pool allocation failures.
